title: SCP-monochrome
description: A mod that adds things from the SCP universe.
body:
The SCP-monochrome mod adds new blocks, structures, and SCP objects to your world.

# KEY CARD READER
In the mod, there is a key card reader that is disguised as a wall block in buildings. The key card reader can emit a signal when a key card of the same or higher level is pressed. To open the disguise interface, press Shift and click with an empty hand on the block to place the desired block in the slot.
![key card reader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54f7c3ea123713b4a3c534e05e6db78a4acf99f0.png)

# ARMORS
There are also 3 types of armor: light, medium, and heavy.
Light armor (without a helmet) is blue and slightly better than iron armor.
Medium armor (with a helmet) is green and slightly better than diamond armor.
Heavy armor (with a helmet) is brown and slightly better than netherite armor, and it causes slowness.
![armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a3bb98889dd52433ddea4db2289c6fc4d5e736d.png)
The text may contain spelling or punctuation errors.

# LIGHTING UNITS
When you click on a block with a customizer, you can change the lamp's settings. You can also use redstone to power them.
![light](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bcb4ab6d839c70518e7d058972b481bafbf4e7a_0.webp)

# The [website](https://scpfoundation.net/) where information about SCP objects was obtained.
The [authors](https://scpfoundation.net/licensing) of the SCP articles
- SCP-009(Chameleon X)
- SCP-500(snorlison)
- SCP-034(SpoonOfEvil)
- SCP-035(Kain Pathos Crow)
- SCP-294(Arcibi)
- SCP-914(Dr Gears)

- SCP-457(yellowdrakex)
- SCP-106(Dr Gears)
